name: Creamy Fennel Soup
intro: Fresh fennel has a slight aniseed flavor; it has a cleansing effect and is good for the digestion. This almond mylk-based soup is inspired by a Spanish potage.

ingredients.item: mint leaves (depending on strength of flavor; start off with 5)
grated Parmesan cheese or nutritional yeast

method: Cut the fennel and cucumber into smaller chunks. Process them in a blender together with the other ingredients—except the topping—and season with more herb salt if needed. Top with Parmesan or—if you’re a vegan—nutritional yeast.
